message:
feat: add GitHub Profile Enhancement Epic beads and blog post illustration

Create GitHub Profile Enhancement Epic (bd-26f4) with 11 child tasks
covering readme stats cards, Mermaid flywheel diagram, live demo gallery,
"What I'm Building Now" section, quick install section, Agent Mail
showcase GIF, Franken suite grouping, Homebrew/Cargo install badges,
Star History chart, GitHub trophy row, and pinned repo optimization.
All tasks block a final review-and-push task (bd-3i19).

Also add overprompting_post_illustration.webp asset for an upcoming
blog post.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
